features: 𝗡𝗼𝘂𝗿𝗶𝘀𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝗺𝘂𝗹𝗮𝘀: Pamper dry skin with these indulgent hand creams enriched with luxurious ingredients like coconut oil, almond milk, avocado oil, and calendula extract.
𝗔𝘄𝗮𝗸𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗥𝗶𝘁𝘂𝗮𝗹: Awaken your senses with the invigorating scent of matcha green tea and cherry blossom in this refreshing hand cream.
𝗥𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗮𝗿𝗲: Restore moisture and suppleness to parched hands with this rich, restorative cream infused with coconut oil and almond milk.
𝗘𝘀𝘀𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗡𝗼𝘂𝗿𝗶𝘀𝗵𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁: This essential hand cream provides deep nourishment for touchably soft, smooth hands thanks to its NutriDuo deep-care formula.
𝗗𝗿𝘆 𝗦𝗸𝗶𝗻 𝗦𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Specially formulated for dry skin, these creams deeply hydrate and nourish to relieve dryness and roughness.
description: Product description Indulge in the luxurious nourishment of Dove's hand creams, specially formulated for dry skin. This set offers a choice of three delightful variants to pamper your hands. The Awakening Ritual hand cream blends the soothing scents of matcha green tea and cherry blossom, while the Invigorating Ritual hand cream harnesses the rejuvenating power of avocado oil and calendula extract. For a rich, restorative experience, the Body Love hand cream infuses your skin with the nourishing goodness of coconut oil and almond milk. Whichever you choose, these creams promise to leave your hands touchably soft, smooth, and deeply moisturised. Embrace the indulgence of Dove's Nourishing Secrets and let your hands bask in the ultimate pampering. Safety Warning For External Use Only
